getReputationScore(address).details: Returns 0 if user has no reputation      A score of 1e18 represents neutral/base reputation (100%)      Scores can range from 0 to type(uint256).max

params.user: The address to query reputation for

returns.score: The reputation score (scaled by 1e18 for precision)

returns.isActive: True if the oracle is operational

getReputationScore(address).notice: Get the reputation score for a given address

isActive().notice: Check if the oracle is active and providing valid data
